name: Vegetable Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Rotini pasta, cooked and drained
2 cups Frozen broccoli and cauliflower mix, thawed and drained
2 1/4 ounces Canned sliced ripe olives, drained
6 ounces Jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, onions, zucchini, broccoli and cauliflower mix, carrots, celery, peas, olives, and artichoke hearts.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, Italian salad dressing, sour cream, prepared mustard, and dried Italian seasoning until well combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the pasta and vegetables, tossing to coat evenly.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
Serves: 16
From: Taste of Home Magazine
